CustomField.description: Formula checkbox: true when the SLA due date has passed and the permit is still active (not Issued, Denied, or Withdrawn). Used by the nepaPermitDependencies LWC for red overdue badge display. NEPA_Permit_SLA_Monitor evaluates this daily to create coordinator Tasks.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically checked when this permit is past its SLA due date and has not been resolved.
CustomField.formula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(nepa_sla_due_date__c)), nepa_sla_due_date__c < TODAY(), NOT(ISPICKVAL(nepa_permit_status__c, "Issued")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(nepa_permit_status__c, "Denied")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(nepa_permit_status__c, "Withdrawn")) )
CustomField.label: SLA Overdue
